name: Creamy Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 leek, white part only, thinly sliced
5 sprigs parsley tied together with kitchen string
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup pot, melt the butter over low heat. Add the onions and cook until softened, about 5 to 8 minutes.
2. Increase the heat to medium. Stir in the leek and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add the potatoes and paprika; cook for 30 seconds.
4. Stir in the broth, thyme, herb bundle, and Worcestershire sauce. Bring the soup to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer, uncovered, for 50 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
5. Remove about 1 cup of vegetables and mash them; return them to the pot. Discard the herb bundle.
6. Stir in the heavy cream and season with salt and pepper. Cook until hot throughout, without boiling.
7. Sprinkle with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
